scripts.dev: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; pnpm run dev:bootstrap && turbo run typegen:watch watch --filter=@wgw/api --filter=@wgw/apps --concurrency=20'
scripts.dev:bootstrap: pnpm --filter @wgw/apps run build:dev && pnpm --filter @wgw/api run sync:runtime
scripts.dev:php: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run dev:php --filter=@wgw/api'
scripts.dev:storybook: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run dev --filter=@wgw/apps'
scripts.dev:onlyoffice: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run dev --filter=@wgw/onlyoffice-web'
scripts.build: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run typegen build'
scripts.check:api-types: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run typegen:check --filter=@wgw/api'
scripts.test: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run test --filter=@wgw/api'
scripts.test:api-e2e: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; pnpm --filter @wgw/api test:e2e'
scripts.setup:macos: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; pnpm --filter @wgw/api setup:macos'
scripts.preview:macos: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; pnpm --filter @wgw/api preview:macos'
